features.label: Palette Generator
features.desc: Auto-generates Shades, Tints and Tones from any color — 7 swatches each.

features.label: Color Harmony
features.desc: Complementary, Split-Complementary, Triadic, Analogous, Tetradic — all with swatches.

features.label: Gradient Generator
features.desc: Pick two colors, angle and type (linear/radial/conic). Live preview + copy CSS.

features.label: Color History
features.desc: Last 12 picked colors shown as swatches.

features.label: CMYK + HWB Support
features.desc: Full CMYK and HWB format support with copy buttons.

features.label: Tailwind CSS Match
features.desc: Finds the closest Tailwind color class with color distance.

features.label: Color Blindness Simulator
features.desc: Simulates Protanopia, Deuteranopia, Tritanopia and Achromatopsia.

features.label: Eyedropper API
features.desc: Pick any color from the screen using the native browser Eyedropper API.

features.label: Export Palette JSON
features.desc: Export current color + history as a JSON file.

features.label: Alpha / Opacity Slider
features.desc: Visual alpha slider with checkerboard background. RGBA output.

features.label: Large Preview Hero
features.desc: Big color swatch at top shows current color with HEX overlay and nearest Tailwind name.

features.label: WCAG Contrast Checker Upgraded
features.desc: Now shows AA Normal, AA Large, AAA Normal, AAA Large — all four levels vs both white and black.
